    "Insufficient torque on electrical terminations",
    "Elevated thermal signature detected via infrared (IR) imaging"

    "De-energize the circuit or panel",
    "Torque all terminal connections to manufacturer-specified values using a calibrated torque tool",

  "rationale": "NEC 110.14(D) requires terminal connection torque to be tightened to manufacturer specifications using an approved tool. Insufficient torque creates high resistance, leading to overheating (as evidenced by the IR thermal signature), which poses a severe fire hazard.",
